motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def peopleAwareOfSecret(self, n: int, delay: int, forget: int) -> int:
    total = 0
    for i in range(n):
        total = (total + (1 << (delay + forget))) % (1000000007)
    return total

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
